title: Узлы
description: Manage paired devices and pending pairing requests
emptyDescription: No paired devices or pending pairing requests.

confirmApprove.title: Approve Pairing
confirmApprove.description: Approve pairing request from {{channel}}:{{senderId}} (code: {{code}})? This device will be able to interact with agents.

confirmDeny.title: Deny Pairing
confirmDeny.description: Deny pairing request from {{channel}}:{{senderId}} (code: {{code}})? The request will be removed.

confirmRevoke.title: Revoke Device
confirmRevoke.description: Revoke pairing for {{channel}}:{{senderId}}? The device will need to re-pair.
